response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the role requires an executive CTO with 5+ years senior leadership, proven scaling of engineering orgs from 10 to 30+, and production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech. Resume shows no people-management track record, no fintech-infrastructure depth (credit risk, working capital, compliance), and only nascent AI-agent tooling exposure rather than production multi-agent systems. The gap between IC craftsman profile and C-level scope is too wide.
strengths: Deep distributed-systems and low-latency backend experience (Sociomantic, high-throughput microservices)
Polyglot full-stack craftsman with TDD/CI/CD discipline and some MCP/agentic tooling exposure at re:cinq
Founder of GISCollective shows long-term ownership and event-driven platform architecture
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems experience and fintech-infrastructure depth (credit risk, compliance, regulated environments)
Career trajectory is senior IC, not technical executive — no board communication, governance, or hybrid-delivery governance experience

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech
